title: mlem - Mod List Export Maker
description: Exports installed mods data to a CSV file
body:
### Description

Export data about the mods installed on your Minecraft client with `/modlist` command. A CSV file will be generated in your instance folder (a clickable message is also displayed to make it easier to open).

Data includes mod id, mod version, mod name, authors list and mod URL. Note that the last 2 fields may be blank since this data is not provided by every mod maker.

### Example export

```csv
file: modlist_2021-11-08-12.04.28.csv

#modid;version;modname;authors;url
abnormals_core;3.3.0;Abnormals Core;Team Abnormals;https://www.teamabnormals.com/mods/abnormals-core
abnormals_delight;1.2.0;Abnormals Delight;Team Abnormals;https://www.teamabnormals.com/mods/abnormals-delight
additionalbanners;6.0.3;AdditionalBanners;Darkhax;https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-banners
advancementplaques;1.4.0;Advancement Plaques;Grend;https://anthonyhilyard.com/
alexsmobs;1.12.0;Alex's Mobs;Alexthe666;https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexsmobs
apotheosis;4.8.0;Apotheosis;; // ← This is an example of mod where data isn't provided.
```
